name: unused-code-cleaner
description: Clean up legacy/deprecated code and tidy YAML configuration files
tasks.name: Analyze codebase for legacy/deprecated patterns
tasks.description: Scan source code for deprecated imports, unused functions, and legacy compatibility code

tasks.name: Find unused code and dead code
tasks.command: python -c "import vulture; v = vulture.Vulture(); v.scavenge(['src/']); v.report()" || echo 'Vulture scan complete (warnings above)'
depends_on.command: python -c "from config.loader import load_config; import glob; configs = glob.glob('config/**/*.yaml', recursive=True); [load_config(c) for c in configs]; print(f'Validated {len(configs)} config files')" && echo 'Config validation PASSED'
depends_on.description: Use vulture to find unused variables, functions, and classes

depends_on.name: Remove legacy compatibility code from source
depends_on.description: Remove deprecated imports, compatibility shims, and unused code

depends_on.name: Analyze YAML configuration files
depends_on.description: List all YAML files for processing

depends_on.name: Tidy and format YAML configuration files
depends_on.description: Sort keys, fix indentation, remove duplicates, standardize format

depends_on.name: Remove deprecated config options
depends_on.description: Remove deprecated configuration options from YAML files

depends_on.name: Validate cleanup didn't break anything
depends_on.command: python -c "from config.loader import load_config; load_config('config/presets/standard.yaml')" && echo 'Config validation PASSED'
depends_on.description: Ensure configs still load correctly after cleanup

depends_on.name: Restore from backup on failure
depends_on.description: Restore original files if cleanup caused issues
